description_long: This is a vintage-style open-face helmet with a textured brown leather-like exterior and a glossy finish. The helmet features prominent black-and-white checkered circular patches on both sides, adding a retro racing aesthetic. There are several small decals and emblems, including a winged red skull motif and round logos, placed on the front and sides. The ear covers are padded and covered in a tan, textured material for comfort. The back of the helmet is plain, showcasing the brown material without any additional graphics or features. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban motorcycling or scooter use.
description: A glossy, brown, vintage-style open-face helmet with checkered side patches, padded ear covers, and racing-themed decals.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open face, padded ear covers, and two small decals including a winged red skull and a round logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large black-and-white checkered patch and the winged red skull decal near the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain brown textured surface with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view features another large checkered patch, two round logos, and the padded ear cover.
attribute_brand_logo: There are two round logos: one on the front left and one on the right side, both circular with text and a small graphic, but the brand is not clearly identifiable.
attribute_graphic_design: Retro racing style with black-and-white checkered side patches, a winged red skull motif, and several small round decals.
